eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Cass, MN; at 7:02 AM on APR 30, 2019 Effective until 7:32 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a test from the Cass County Sheriffs Ofice. This is only a test. This is a test from the Cass County Sheriffs Ofice. This is only a test.
